title: CT17 automation-first Lean tactic
description: The complete compiled graph, general capability API, specialized capability profiles, node automation contracts, and semantic residual inventory for this tactic.

transitions.constructorType:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.entry CT17.Graph.NodeId.compatibility

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          CT17.IncompatibilityResidual S capability ctx input →
            CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.compatibility
              CT17.Graph.NodeId.incompatibilityTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input →
            CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.compatibility CT17.Graph.NodeId.scale

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            CT17.FiniteScaleState S capability ctx input compatible →
              CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.scale CT17.Graph.NodeId.survivors

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            CT17.OrbitScaleState S capability ctx input compatible →
              CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.scale CT17.Graph.NodeId.arithmetic

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            {finite : CT17.FiniteScaleState S capability ctx input compatible} →
              CT17.ExhaustedCertificate S capability ctx input →
                CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.survivors CT17.Graph.NodeId.exhaustedTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            {finite : CT17.FiniteScaleState S capability ctx input compatible} →
              CT17.SurvivorResidual S capability ctx input →
                CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.survivors CT17.Graph.NodeId.survivorTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            {orbit : CT17.OrbitScaleState S capability ctx input compatible} →
              CT17.TargetHitCertificate S capability ctx input orbit →
                CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.arithmetic CT17.Graph.NodeId.targetHitTerminal

{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} →
        {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} →
          {compatible : CT17.CompatibleState S capability ctx input} →
            {orbitState : CT17.OrbitScaleState S capability ctx input compatible} →
              CT17.OrbitResidual S capability ctx input orbitState →
                CT17.Graph.Edge S capability ctx input CT17.Graph.NodeId.arithmetic CT17.Graph.NodeId.orbitTerminal

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of target patterns considered by the thickening search.
presentation.label: Thickening target

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT17.Spec P → Type uTarget
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.Target

presentation.plainExplanation: The finite type of offsets used to place or compare target patterns.
presentation.label: Target offset

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT17.Spec P → Type uOffset
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.Offset

presentation.plainExplanation: The scale-indexed type of positions examined inside a finite block.
presentation.label: Scale position

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT17.Spec P → ℕ → Type uPosition
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.Position

presentation.plainExplanation: The type of exact values compared across targets, blocks, and orbits.
presentation.label: Comparison value

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT17.Spec P → Type uValue
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.Value

presentation.plainExplanation: Assigns the exact comparison value required by each target.
presentation.label: Target value

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT17.Spec P) → self.Target → self.Value
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.targetValue

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the value observed at a scale-indexed block position and offset.
presentation.label: Block value

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (self : CT17.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → {scale : ℕ} → self.Position scale → self.Offset → self.Value
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.blockValue

presentation.plainExplanation: Computes the orbit-side comparison value at scale n and offset o.
presentation.label: Orbit value

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT17.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → ℕ → self.Offset → self.Value
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.orbitValue

presentation.plainExplanation: The proposition that offset o is admissible for target t in branch x.
presentation.label: Target-offset compatibility

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (self : CT17.Spec P) → Core.BranchContext P → self.Target → self.Offset → Prop
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Spec.Compatible

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all thickening targets.
presentation.label: Finite target enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → FinEnum S.Target
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.targets

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of all target offsets.
presentation.label: Finite offset enumeration

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → FinEnum S.Offset
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.offsets

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of the positions available at every scale.
presentation.label: Finite scale positions

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → (scale : ℕ) → FinEnum (S.Position scale)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.positions

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a target-offset pair is compatible.
presentation.label: Compatibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    CT17.Capability S →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        (target : S.Target) → (offset : S.Offset) → Decidable (S.Compatible ctx target offset)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.compatibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable equality on comparison values, used to certify target hits and mismatches.
presentation.label: Value equality decision

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → DecidableEq S.Value
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.valueDecidableEq

presentation.plainExplanation: The declared bound separating exhaustive finite-scale analysis from survivor arithmetic.
presentation.label: Finite scale limit

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.finiteScaleLimit

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.NodeId

apiDeclarations.type: CT17.Graph.NodeId → String
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.NodeId.code

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        CT17.Input S capability ctx →
          CT17.Graph.NodeId → CT17.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max (max uOffset uPosition) uTarget) uValue)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.Edge

apiDeclarations.type: Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.Terminal

apiDeclarations.type: CT17.Graph.Terminal → CT17.Graph.NodeId
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.Terminal.nodeId

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        CT17.Input S capability ctx →
          CT17.Graph.NodeId → CT17.Graph.NodeId → Type (max (max (max uOffset uPosition) uTarget) uValue)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.Path

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    {capability : CT17.Capability S} →
      {ctx : Core.BranchContext P} → {input : CT17.Input S capability ctx} → List CT17.Graph.NodeId → Prop
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Graph.ValidTrace

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → CT17.Spec P → Type (max (max (max (max (max uAmbient uBranch) uOffset) uPosition) uTarget) uValue)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability

apiDeclarations.type: {P : Core.Problem} → (S : CT17.Spec P) → CT17.Capability S → Core.BranchContext P → Type
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Input

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        CT17.Input S capability ctx → Type (max (max (max uOffset uPosition) uTarget) uValue)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.ExecutionResult

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        CT17.Input S capability ctx → CT17.Graph.Terminal → Type (max (max (max uOffset uPosition) uTarget) uValue)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.RawOutcome

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) → CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run

apiDeclarations.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  (S : CT17.Spec P) →
    (capability : CT17.Capability S) →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) → (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) → CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.runReference

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  CT17.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input (CT17.run S capability ctx input).outcome
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_verified

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  CT17.Graph.ValidTrace (CT17.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input (CT17.run S capability ctx input))
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_trace_valid

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx),
  ∃ result,
    CT17.RawOutcome.Valid S capability ctx input result.outcome ∧
      CT17.Graph.ValidTrace (CT17.ExecutionResult.trace S capability ctx input result)
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_total

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) (left right : CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  left = CT17.run S capability ctx input → right = CT17.run S capability ctx input → left = right
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.run_deterministic

apiDeclarations.type:
∀ {P : Core.Problem} (S : CT17.Spec P) (capability : CT17.Capability S) (ctx : Core.BranchContext P)
  (input : CT17.Input S capability ctx) (result : CT17.ExecutionResult S capability ctx input),
  result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.incompatibility ∨
    result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.exhausted ∨
      result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.survivors ∨
        result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.targetHit ∨ result.terminal = CT17.Graph.Terminal.orbit
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.outcome_exhaustive

apiDeclarations.type: Core.CapabilityContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.capabilityContract

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.NodeAutomationContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.nodeAutomationContracts

apiDeclarations.type: List Core.ResidualKindContract
apiDeclarations.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.residualKindContracts

presentation.plainExplanation: An exhaustive ordered enumeration of the positions available at every scale.
presentation.label: Finite scale positions

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → (scale : ℕ) → FinEnum (S.Position scale)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.positions

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable evidence deciding whether a target-offset pair is compatible.
presentation.label: Compatibility decision procedure

formalDeclaration.type:
{P : Core.Problem} →
  {S : CT17.Spec P} →
    CT17.Capability S →
      (ctx : Core.BranchContext P) →
        (target : S.Target) → (offset : S.Offset) → Decidable (S.Compatible ctx target offset)
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.compatibleDecidable

presentation.plainExplanation: Executable equality on comparison values, used to certify target hits and mismatches.
presentation.label: Value equality decision

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → DecidableEq S.Value
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.valueDecidableEq

presentation.plainExplanation: The declared bound separating exhaustive finite-scale analysis from survivor arithmetic.
presentation.label: Finite scale limit

formalDeclaration.type: {P : Core.Problem} → {S : CT17.Spec P} → CT17.Capability S → ℕ
formalDeclaration.name: StructuralExhaustion.CT17.Capability.finiteScaleLimit
